name: Jennifer Palmieri, Hillary for America
subject: Add your name to get the inside scoop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Watch this: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI1OTQyMzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNDI4ODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) You and I both know that Republicans will latch on to whatever far-flung theories they can find in order to try and distract from Hillary's record of fighting for everyday Americans.

That's why we're kicking off The Briefing, your go-to source for the facts you need to set the story straight.

Today, we're debunking some of the worst conspiracy theories in _Clinton Cash_ , the latest "book" trashing Hillary's record of service.

**[Watch the video to find out more, and then sign up to get more Briefings throughout the campaign:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1OTQyMzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNDI4ODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI1OTQyMzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNDI4ODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) The Briefing will be your regular download on what you can do to help fight back against attacks like these. We'll keep you current on the latest news stories -- both fact and fiction -- so you can pass on the truth to your friends and family.

**Facts matter, and you deserve to know them. So check out this first video and then put your name on the list to get regular Briefings:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/briefing/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1OTQyMzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNDI4ODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Jennifer

Jennifer Palmieri
Communications Director
Hillary for America
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI1OTQyMzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNDI4ODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1OTQyMzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNDI4ODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1OTQyMzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNDI4ODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Today, we're debunking some of the worst conspiracy theories in Clinton Cash , the latest "book" trashing Hillary's record of service. The Briefing will be your regular download on what you can do to help fight back against attacks like these. We'll keep you current on the latest news stories -- both fact and fiction -- so you can pass on the truth to your friends and family. Facts matter, and you deserve to know them. name: Team Murphy
subject: FWD: SIGN to end Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Did you see Patrick's message?Hey -- Did you see Patrick's message? He's asking you to join him (and Hillary Clinton!) in calling for a constitutional amendment to end _Citizens United_. **Last chance -- will you add your name?** **[act.murphyforflorida.com/End-Citizens-United](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27e5/738133e4/39a97c46/7f9bb496/2831486381/VEsH/ "http://sign.citizens-against-citizens-united.com/#murphy")** -Team Murphy \---------Forwarded message--------- Date: Friday, April 24, 2015
Subject: SIGN to end Citizens United Friend -- In 2012, I defeated Allen West by 0.6% in the MOST expensive U.S. House race in history. I've seen firsthand how dark money in politics has made extreme Tea Party candidates competitive in places where they shouldn't be. And I've seen too many extreme Republicans come to Congress. The bottom line is that I'm disgusted by what the disastrous _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision has done to our democracy. **Now that Hillary Clinton has brought the fight to overturn _Citizens United_ to the national stage, we must stand with her.** | _**"We need to fix our dysfunctional political system, and get unaccountable money out of it once and for all -- even if it takes a constitutional amendment."**_
-Hillary Clinton, 4/14/2015 | **[SIGN IF YOU AGREE »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27e5/738133e4/39a97c46/7f9bb496/2831486381/VEsE/ "http://sign.citizens-against-citizens-united.com/#murphy")**
---
Hillary is right. We must do whatever it takes to get unaccountable money out of politics -- even if it takes a constitutional amendment.
**[If you're "all in" to end _Citizens United_ , click here to join Hillary and me in calling for a constitutional amendment today.](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27e5/738133e4/39a97c46/7f9bb496/2831486381/VEsF/ "http://sign.citizens-against-citizens-united.com/#murphy")**
Thanks,
Patrick Murphy
**[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-may2015?refcode=ema_2015-05-05_b1_tm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27e5/738133e4/39a97c46/7f9bb490/2831486381/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: Team Bernie
subject: VIDEO: Bernie on the campaign trail
body:
#
Friend -

Bernie went to New Hampshire on the first official stop of his presidential campaign. Watch this video to see Bernie discuss why he's running, then [**share it with your friends and family**](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2135/43f17890/5e366665/621df46a/2403999365/VEsH/ "https://secure.berniesanders.com/page/share/nh-video?utm_medium=email&utm_source=TeamBernie&utm_campaign=launch&utm_content=video"):

[](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2135/43f17890/5e366665/621df46a/2403999365/VEsE/ "https://secure.berniesanders.com/page/share/nh-video?utm_medium=email&utm_source=TeamBernie&utm_campaign=launch&utm_content=video")

[](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2135/43f17890/5e366665/621df46b/2403999365/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvideo.php%3Fv%3D832095333512139") [](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2135/43f17890/5e366665/621df468/2403999365/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/BernieSanders/status/595624473124020224")
Our campaign for president is about creating a mass movement of people fighting to change our country. Thanks so much for being a part of this effort.

\- Team Bernie

[](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2135/43f17890/5e366665/621df469/2403999365/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150505_newhampshirevideo")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
(not the billionaires)
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2135/43f17890/5e366665/621df416/2403999365/VEsA/ "http://go.berniesanders.com/unsubscribe"). Stand the against powerful special interests that are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2135/43f17890/5e366665/621df417/2403999365/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: National Teacher Appreciation Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
[](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91e79/70cc2804/4786bd30/3943e85/1403224602/VEsH/ "http://vanhollen.org")
Friends,

Today is National Teacher Appreciation Day, a day to honor those who dedicate their lives to educating our kids. It's also the 23rd day since the General Assembly passed over $68 million in funding for Maryland's public schools -- funding that Governor Hogan is still refusing to release.

School funding is critically important to our children's future and to the future economic well-being of Maryland families -- especially as too many feel like they are either running in place or falling behind.

In Congress, I'm leading the budget battle to stop Republicans from cutting education funding, slashing Pell Grants, and increasing the cost of loans for college students. And at home, I'm asking you to join me in calling on Governor Hogan to stop withholding school funding from our teachers and kids.

Show Maryland teachers and students you support them by calling upon Governor Hogan to IMMEDIATELY RELEASE the funding for our kids' education. Instead of playing games with our kids' education, we need to be investing in education at every level.

[**Please sign the petition calling on Governor Hogan to do the right thing and release the $68 million in school funding now!**](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91e79/70cc2804/4786bd30/3943e82/1403224602/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/education-funding-cuts")

Thank you,

Chris

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/unsubscribe](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91e79/70cc2804/4786bd30/3943e83/1403224602/VEsF/ "https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
